summary: Iteration 53 - Avatar Video Mode Feature Testing. All features verified working. Backend endpoint POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/extract-from-video correctly extracts frame and audio from video uploads, returns 400 for non-video files. Frontend avatar modal shows Photo/Video tabs with correct icons (Camera/Film), default is Photo mode, upload button text changes appropriately, video hint appears in video mode, and file input accepts correct MIME types.

BACKEND_1_extract_from_video_endpoint.details: Endpoint exists at line 2863 of pipeline.py. Returns frame_url, audio_url, and duration. Uses FFmpeg to extract frame at 1/3 of video duration and audio as MP3. Both are uploaded to Supabase storage.

BACKEND_2_rejects_non_video_files.details: Returns 400 status code with 'File must be a video' error for non-video files (text, images)

BACKEND_4_extracts_frame_and_audio.details: Successfully extracts frame (to Supabase avatars/video_frame_*.jpg) and audio (to voice_recordings/video_voice_*.mp3) from test video

FRONTEND_1_photo_video_tabs.details: Both tabs visible at top of avatar creation modal. Photo tab shows Camera icon with 'From Photo' text. Video tab shows Film icon with 'From Video' text.

FRONTEND_2_default_photo_mode.details: Default tab is 'From Photo' - photo tab has active styling (bg-[#C9A84C]/10 text-[#C9A84C] border-b-2 border-[#C9A84C])

FRONTEND_3_upload_button_photo.details: Upload button shows 'Select Photo' in photo mode (t('studio.select_photo'))

FRONTEND_4_switch_to_video.details: Clicking 'From Video' tab switches to video mode, tab becomes active with gold styling

FRONTEND_5_upload_button_video.details: Upload button changes to 'Select Video' in video mode (t('studio.select_video'))

FRONTEND_6_video_hint.details: Video hint 'Upload a 10-30s video of the person speaking naturally' appears only in video mode

FRONTEND_7_file_input_photo_mode.details: File input accepts 'image/png,image/jpeg,image/jpg,image/webp' in photo mode

FRONTEND_8_file_input_video_mode.details: File input accepts 'video/mp4,video/quicktime,video/webm,video/*' in video mode (verified from code)

FRONTEND_9_voice_extracted_badge.details: Green 'Real voice extracted' badge appears when avatarExtractedAudio is set (verified in code lines 1962-1967)

FRONTEND_10_photo_mode_still_works.details: Photo mode continues to work as before - upload photo, generate avatar with AI

i18n_keys_verified.upload_video_title: Upload a video to create your avatar
i18n_keys_verified.upload_video_desc: AI extracts your image, movements and real voice
i18n_keys_verified.video_hint: Upload a 10-30s video of the person speaking naturally
i18n_keys_verified.video_extracted: Image and voice extracted from video!

seed_data_creation: Test video created at /tmp/test_video.mp4 using FFmpeg (5 seconds, 320x240, with audio sine wave)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53: Avatar Video Mode feature fully tested and working. Key data-testids: avatar-source-photo, avatar-source-video, avatar-upload-btn, generate-avatar-btn. Backend extract-from-video endpoint returns frame_url and audio_url. Video uploads trigger uploadAvatarVideo() which calls the endpoint and sets avatarExtractedAudio state if audio is extracted. The voice_extracted badge (green) appears when audio is extracted. Previous iterations: 50 (avatar edit), 51 (angle regen), 52 (brand toggle).

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - extract-from-video uses FFmpeg for video processing and Supabase Storage for uploads
